case_title: SHEILA FOSTER VS. SURF CITY SQUEEZE et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHUNG, KYOO B. IND. AND DBA SURF CITY SQUEEZE

DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. 1. DEFENDANTS KYOO B. CHUNG IND/DBA SURF CITY SQUEEZE'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. TWO OFF-CALENDAR; BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATION THAT RESPONSES HAVE BEEN FILED, MOTION IS MOOT; 2. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS GRANTED; SANCTIONS SHALL ISSUE IN THE SUM OF $290.00, PAYABLE WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE DATE OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Defendants Kyoo b. Chung ind/dba Surf City Squeeze's motion to compel responses to request for production of documents, Set No. Two off-calendar; based on plaintiff's representation that responses have been filed, motion is moot;
2. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within 30 days of the date of service of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
